scripts.dev: concurrently --names server,dash --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev -w @adgh/server" "npm run dev -w @adgh/dashboard"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @adgh/server && npm run build -w @adgh/dashboard
scripts.test: npm run test -w @adgh/server && npm run test -w @adgh/dashboard
scripts.release: node -e "const v=require('./packages/client/package.json').version; const tag='v'+v; require('child_process').execSync('git tag '+tag+' && git push origin '+tag, {stdio:'inherit'})"
